task_completion.description: Verify the 'Fix transaction history pagination bug' work package has its priority and status updated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the work package 'Fix transaction history pagination bug' in the OpenProject interface. Its Priority should be set to 'Immediate' and its Status should be 'In progress'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Fix transaction history pagination bug' work package has the required comment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the activity/comments section of the 'Fix transaction history pagination bug' work package. There must be a comment stating: 'PRODUCTION INCIDENT: Users cannot see transactions older than 90 days. Customer support tickets increasing. Escalated to P0. All hands on deck until resolved.'

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Security audit - JWT token expiration' work package has its priority updated and the required comment added.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the work package 'Security audit - JWT token expiration'. Its Priority should be set to 'High'. In the activity/comments section, there must be a comment stating: 'Security vulnerability confirmed: JWT tokens persist after logout. Must be patched before next release. Adding to Sprint 1 security hardening scope.'

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the new 'Emergency: Token invalidation on user logout' bug work package with correct attributes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a newly created 'Bug' work package titled 'Emergency: Token invalidation on user logout'. Verify it is assigned to 'carol.williams', placed in 'Sprint 1 - Auth & Onboarding', has 'Urgent' priority, and the description contains 'Implement immediate token revocation when user logs out. Related to JWT security audit findings.'

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Incident Report - Transaction History' wiki page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a wiki page in the 'mobile-banking-app' project titled 'Incident Report - Transaction History'. The page content should document the production incident, including bug description, customer impact, escalation timeline, assigned team members, and remediation steps.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the OpenProject web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the OpenProject web application running in a browser at localhost:8080, not terminal commands (like curl or API scripts) used to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not fake the output in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The comments, work package details, and wiki page must be visible within the actual OpenProject UI elements (forms, activity feeds, wiki viewer), not written in a text editor like Notepad or Nano.

integrity.description: Ensure the wiki page was actually saved and published in OpenProject.
integrity.visual_evidence: The wiki page 'Incident Report - Transaction History' should be shown in its saved/published state within the OpenProject wiki module, not just as text typed into a draft input box that was never submitted.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Project identifier is 'mobile-banking-app'. The agent must modify two existing work packages exactly named 'Fix transaction history pagination bug' and 'Security audit - JWT token expiration'. The agent must create a new work package exactly named 'Emergency: Token invalidation on user logout' and a wiki page exactly titled 'Incident Report - Transaction History'.
